meta.title: Terminowo — Scan documents, track deadlines
meta.description: Scan documents, extract expiry dates, and get timely reminders. Privacy-first — data stays on your device.
hero.headline:
Scan any document
and keep track of deadlines
hero.subtitle: Terminowo digitalizes all your contracts, receipts, policies, and sends smart notification before each document's due
use.title: Use Terminowo with everything
use.subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
use.subscriptions.desc: Never miss a renewal. Track Netflix, Amazon Prime, gym memberships, and any other recurring service — all in one place.
use.insurance.title: Insurance
use.insurance.desc: Keep your health, travel, and car insurance policies organized. Get notified before coverage runs out.
use.vehicle.title: Vehicle documents
use.vehicle.desc: Stay on top of MOTs, technical inspections, and registration renewals. Know what's due before it's overdue.
features.title: All the features you need
features.categories.title: Organized by category.
features.categories.desc: Terminowo keeps different document types neatly separated.
features.status.title: Know what needs attention.
features.status.desc: Color-coded status indicators show what's still valid, what's expiring soon, and what's already overdue.
features.scanning.title: Instant scanning.
features.scanning.desc: Terminowo reads the expiry date automatically.
features.reminders.title: Reminders your way.
features.reminders.desc: Choose when to be notified — 14 days out, a week before, or the day itself.
features.glance.title: Everything at a glance.
features.glance.desc: See all your documents in one view.
cta.title:
Try Terminowo
for free
cta.subtitle: No subscriptions, no paywalls. Download the app, scan your first document in under a minute, and never miss a deadline again.
faq.title: Have questions about Terminowo?
faq.a1: Open the app, point your camera at any paper document, and tap Scan. Terminowo uses OCR to read the expiry date and pre-fills the details for you automatically.
faq.q2: What types of documents can I add?
faq.a2: Insurance policies, driver's licenses, vehicle inspections, rental agreements, subscriptions, payment receipts — anything with an expiry date.
faq.q3: Can I add documents manually without scanning?
faq.a3: Yes! You can enter document details manually if you prefer not to use the camera.
faq.a4: Choose when you want to be reminded — 90 days, 30 days, 7 days, or 1 day before expiry. Set multiple reminders for the same document.
faq.q5: Is Terminowo available on both iOS and Android?
faq.a5: Yes, Terminowo is available on both iOS and Android platforms.
faq.a6: Your documents and personal data are stored locally on your phone. No cloud storage, no accounts required, no data shared with third parties.
faq.q7: Is the app free to use?
faq.a7: Yes, Terminowo is completely free. No subscriptions, no hidden costs.
faq.q8: Can I edit a document after I've saved it?
faq.a8: Absolutely. You can update the name, category, expiry date, and reminder settings at any time.
final_cta.headline: Never miss a deadline again.
